description: Production-diff default chain (Iron pipeline + QA). root → executor → seconder → test-engineer → test-runner → obligations-scanner → reviewer. For type=task/bug with scrutiny>=medium. security-auditor is dispatched separately if scope hits sensitive surface (auth/secrets/migrations/etc.) — see security-deep template for embedded variant.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (fill in: what needs implementing and why)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in)
VALIDATION: (fill in: tests/commands that prove correctness)
ACCEPTANCE: (fill in: externally observable outcome)

Production-diff scrutiny: {{scrutiny}}. Iron pipeline applies (seconder + obligations-scanner mandatory; reviewer may auto-escalate scrutiny on surface match).

steps.title: executor:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: implement root's deliverable per its contract.
INPUTS: root's PROBLEM/SCOPE/ACCEPTANCE/VALIDATION; existing code in {{scope}}.
OUTPUTS: diff on chain branch satisfying ACCEPTANCE; tests passing per VALIDATION; obligations discipline (no unstructured TODO/FIXME in production; structured `// TODO(<bead-id>):` only when bead-tracked in NON_GOALS).
SCOPE: same as root ({{scope}}).
NON_GOALS: no `--no-verify`; no edits outside SCOPE; no merge.

steps.title: seconder:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: fused scope/compliance + quality gate on executor's diff.
INPUTS: executor's diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict JSON with scope_verdict, scope_findings, quality_verdict, quality_findings, overall_verdict.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: test-engineer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: write tests against the actual diff.
INPUTS: executor's diff; seconder verdict; root contract.
OUTPUTS: tests, fixtures, smoke scripts, telemetry assertions, exact test-runner commands.
SCOPE: test paths plus diff-adjacent harness code.
NON_GOALS: no production source edits unless root explicitly authorizes helper/export change.

steps.title: test-runner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: execute exact commands supplied by test-engineer and classify failures by owner.
INPUTS: exact commands; tests; telemetry assertions.
OUTPUTS: pass/fail counts, artifact evidence, owner routing, rerun guidance.
SCOPE: requested commands only; fallback must be labeled.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no scope expansion.

steps.title: obligations-scanner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: scan executor's diff for unstructured TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX/TEMP/WIP/NOTE(release) markers in production code.
INPUTS: executor's diff.
OUTPUTS: structured JSON: CLEAN | OBLIGATIONS_FOUND | BLOCKED. Distinguish production vs test/fixture surface; distinguish TRACKED `// TODO(<bead-id>):` vs UNTRACKED.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; reviewer enforces, scanner only reports.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer + adversarial code-quality auditor. Iron-aware: SCRUTINY={{scrutiny}}, may auto-escalate on sensitive-surface match.
INPUTS: executor diff + seconder verdict + test evidence + obligations-scanner output + root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + machine-readable Release Checklist. PARTIAL triggers ddiff re-review after fix.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; do not waive mandatory gates.
